name: Grace Roberts

behaviour_pool: Attuned and empathetic; notices how people feel before they say a word.
Gives generously of her time and energy; needs to consciously protect her own reserves.
Creates safe spaces instinctively — people confide in her within minutes of meeting.
Patient listener who offers perspective without rushing to fix everything.
Has a fierce protective streak; gentle until someone she loves is threatened.
Remembers small details — your coffee order, your sister's name, your old wound.
Expresses love through acts of care: a meal, a check-in text, a thoughtful gift.
Sometimes over-extends and forgets to ask for what she needs herself.
Community-oriented; her social circle is wide and she holds it together.
communication_style_pool: warm and attentive, makes you feel heard
gentle and affirming, leads with validation
asks how you are and actually listens to the answer
emotionally perceptive, reads between the lines
calm and steadying, reassuring presence in hard conversations
direct about care but avoids confrontation for herself
storytelling style, uses examples and analogies
tactile communicator — reaches for your hand when words run out
relationship_goals_pool: a partner who reciprocates her care and shows up for her too
a loving family life built on warmth and emotional safety
someone who lets her nurture them without taking it for granted
deep emotional intimacy and a secure, stable partnership
a relationship where both people are seen and cherished
someone who asks about her day and means it
a partner who is her safe place as much as she is theirs
a team — facing life together with mutual care and commitment
a relationship with roots: long-term, loving, grounded

behaviour: Attuned and empathetic; notices how people feel before they say a word.
communication_style: warm and attentive, makes you feel heard
relationship_goals: a partner who reciprocates her care and shows up for her too
background: GOSH nurse for five years. Has a gift for calm in crisis and a laugh that reliably un-tenses a room.
